ROCK2_kinase.analysis_method: BioPython structural analysis + kinase motif annotation
ROCK2_kinase.structure_source: AlphaFold2 predicted, trimmed to kinase domain

therapeutic_context.sma_relevance: ROCK1 UP in ALS motor neurons. ROCK2 is the predominant isoform in brain. ROCK inhibition rescues actin dynamics in SMA models.

LIMK2_kinase.analysis_method: BioPython structural analysis + kinase motif annotation
LIMK2_kinase.structure_source: AlphaFold2 predicted, trimmed to kinase domain

therapeutic_context.sma_relevance: LIMK2 (not LIMK1) is the SMA-relevant kinase. Phosphorylates cofilin at Ser3, inactivating actin depolymerization. LIMK2 inhibition could restore actin dynamics in SMA motor neurons.

docking_results.H-1152: +0.90 (strong binding — flat pyridinone scaffold fits ATP pocket)
docking_results.Fasudil: +0.07 (poor fit — morpholino group clashes with hinge region)
docking_results.interpretation: LIMK2 ATP pocket favors flat aromatic scaffolds over bulky aliphatic groups

druggability_features.selectivity_notes: Fasudil scores only +0.07 — morpholino group likely too bulky for LIMK2 hinge pocket. Flat aromatic scaffolds (quinazolines, pyrimidinones) preferred.

druggability_features.relevance: Type II kinase inhibitor design — extends from ATP site into back pocket
Cofilin-Ser3 phosphorylation interface — substrate-competitive inhibition possible but challenging
